de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class ProblemLoader

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractProblemLoader
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.ProblemLoader

  • public final class ProblemLoader
extends AbstractProblemLoader
    This class extends the functionality of the AbstractProblemLoader. It allows to do the loading process as SwingWorker3 Thread and it opens the proof obligation browser it is not possible to instantiate a proof configured by the opened file.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractProblemLoader

    • Method Detail

      • runSynchronously

        public void runSynchronously()

      • selectAndLoadProof

        protected void selectAndLoadProof(ProblemLoaderControl control,
                                  InitConfig initConfig)
        Description copied from class: AbstractProblemLoader
        Asks the user to select a proof obligation and loads it.
        Overrides:
        selectAndLoadProof in class AbstractProblemLoader
        Parameters:
        control - the ui controller.
        initConfig - the proof configuration.
        See Also:
        AbstractProblemLoader.load()

      • runAsynchronously

        public void runAsynchronously()
        Launch a loading process asynchronously (on a swingworker thread). The start is announced by invoking ProverTaskListener#taskStarted(String, int) on the registered listener. Termination is announced by invoking ProverTaskListener.taskFinished(TaskFinishedInfo) on the registered listener.
